meaning: n.(中世纪)犹太神秘哲学,秘法
examples: The Oro Verde cooperative exports 10 times as much top-rate coffee as it did in 2000 and nearly 100 times as much cocoa, says manager Hiderico Bocangel Cabala.
Waving from the red-carpeted steps of the Grand Palais were your Hankses and Diazes, your Brad Pitts and Mike Myerses — enough representatives of the rich and famous to fill a Cabala convention.
But Judge Cabala affirms that Peruvian records show that happened on July 18, 1998.
